findings.title: Frigate NVR Blind RCE via go2rtc Exec Injection
findings.summary: Configuration manipulation in Frigate NVR allows blind RCE via go2rtc exec injection with both authenticated and unauthenticated paths; public PoC available.

findings.title: Langflow RCE via Unsafe Code Validation
findings.summary: RCE in Langflow code validation endpoint when AUTO_LOGIN enabled with default credentials; public PoC available.

findings.title: OWASP ModSecurity CRS WAF Bypass
findings.summary: WAF bypass in ModSecurity CRS allows malicious payloads to evade inspection; Docker-based PoC published.

noted.summary: Wormable campaign with BYOVD, logic bombs, and air-gap jumping via USB storage.
February Patch Wednesday: 632 vulnerabilities patched including 305 in kernel.
